name: sacred temple
hints: A temple room with an ornate chest. This is likely a treasure or contains important items.
GET CHEST or OPEN CHEST to access its contents. The chest itself may be a treasure.
Take the ornate chest. Go SOUTH to return to the altar room.
notes: Temple room with an ornate chest - likely a treasure item. South returns to the altar room (room 22). The chest may contain items when opened.
